## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

Fixes # (issue number if applicable)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:
- [ ] Added new tests
- [ ] Updated existing tests
- [ ] All tests pass locally

```bash
make test
```

## Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (`make fmt`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings (`make lint`)
- [ ] I have verified there are no vulnerabilities (`make vuln`)

## Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added/updated relevant comments in the code
- [ ] I have updated README.md if needed

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the contribution guidelines
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes have been tested thoroughly
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented if breaking)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here.

---

**Note**: Before merging, ensure:
1. All CI checks pass
2. Code coverage doesn't decrease
3. Commit messages are clear and descriptive
4. Reviewers have approved the changes
